values.content:
=Parse this raw task request and structure it:

Raw Request: {{ $json.request_text }}
Requested By: {{ $json.requester }}

Return JSON with:
- title (string, max 10 words)
- description (string, clear and concise)
- priority (low/medium/high/critical)
- estimated_hours (number)
- required_skills (array of strings)
- task_type (bug/feature/documentation/meeting)

Return only valid JSON.

=Analyze this project task data for a daily management report:

Tasks Data: {{ JSON.stringify($input.first().json) }}

Provide a JSON response with:
- total_tasks (number)
- completed_today (number)
- at_risk_tasks (array of task_ids that are close to deadline or high priority and not started)
- team_velocity_score (1-10)
- top_bottlenecks (array of 2-3 strings)
- daily_summary (2-3 sentences)
- manager_action_items (array of 3 actionable items for the project manager)

Return only valid JSON.

parameters.subject: =Daily Project Health Report - {{ $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}
